# KiloMail

> Disposable email service with real-time SSE inboxes at @kilolabs.space. No sign-up, no tracking, auto-expiry after 10 minutes.

Important notes:

- Built on Vercel Edge Functions, Upstash Redis, and Cloudflare Email Workers
- Inboxes auto-expire 10 minutes after the last email received
- Open source under MIT license

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/Cryptoistaken/KiloMail/blob/main/README.md): Setup guide for Redis, Cloudflare, and Vercel deployment
- [Architecture](https://github.com/Cryptoistaken/KiloMail): Cloudflare MX → Email Worker → Vercel webhook → Upstash Redis

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Cryptoistaken/KiloMail): Source code and issues
